name: LinerBar

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: Represents the possible messages that can be sent to update the LinerBar.

aliases.name: Data
aliases.comment: Represents the data used to populate the LinerBar.
aliases.type: { title : Maybe.Maybe String.String, items : List.List LinerBar.Item, dark : Basics.Bool }

aliases.name: Item
aliases.comment: Represents a single item within the LinerBar data.
aliases.type: { name : String.String, value : Basics.Float, color : String.String }

aliases.name: Model
aliases.comment: Represents the overall state of the LinerBar component.
aliases.type: { data : LinerBar.Data, activatedItem : Maybe.Maybe String.String, hoveredItem : Maybe.Maybe String.String }

values.name: init
values.comment:
Initializes the LinerBar model with the data.

    - `data`: The initial data for the LinerBar.

    Example:

    import LinerBar

    initialModel : LinerBar.Model
    initialModel =
        LinerBar.init myData

values.name: update
values.comment:
Updates the LinerBar model based on the given message.

    - `msg`: The message to process.
    - `model`: The current LinerBar model.

    The function handles the following messages:

    - `ActivateDeactivateItem id`: Toggles the active state of the item with the given ID.
    - `HoverItem id`: Sets the hovered item to the item with the given ID.
    - `LeaveItem`: Clears the hovered item.

values.name: view
values.comment:
Renders the LinerBar component.

  - `model`: The current LinerBar model.

This function uses the `LinerBarStyles` module to apply styles to the
different parts of the chart.

name: LinerBarStyles
comment:
This module provides styling attributes for a linear bar chart component.

# Styles

@docs cardBodyStyles, cardStyles, cardTitleStyles, 
    legendItemButtonStyles, legendItemDotStyles, legendItemNameStyles,
    legendItemStyles, legendStyles, progressItemStyles, progressStyles

# Helper Functions

@docs styleList

values.name: cardStyles
values.comment:
Base styles for the card container that holds the entire chart.

- `dark`: A boolean indicating whether to apply dark theme styles.

values.name: cardTitleStyles
values.comment:
Styles for the title of the chart.

- `dark`: A boolean indicating whether to apply dark theme styles.

values.name: legendItemButtonStyles
values.comment: Styles for the legend item button (the button that contains the dot and the name).

values.name: legendItemDotStyles
values.comment:
Styles for the colored dot in the legend.

- `color`: The color of the dot, matching the bar it represents.

values.name: legendItemNameStyles
values.comment:
Styles for the name of the item in the legend.

- `dark`: A boolean indicating whether to apply dark theme styles.

values.name: progressItemStyles
values.comment:
Styles for individual progress bar items.

- `isActivated`: Indicates if the bar is currently activated (e.g., by clicking the legend).
- `isHovered`: Indicates if the mouse is currently hovering over the bar.
- `isFirstItem`: Indicates if this is the first bar item in the chart.
- `isLastItem`: Indicates if this is the last bar item in the chart.
- `color`: The background color of the bar.
- `progressWidth`: The width of the bar, expressed as a percentage (e.g., "50%").
values.type: Basics.Bool -> Basics.Bool -> Basics.Bool -> Basics.Bool -> String.String -> Basics.Float -> List.List ( String.String, String.String )

values.name: progressStyles
values.comment: Styles for the progress bar container.

values.name: styleList
values.comment: Helper function to convert a list of style pairs into a list of `Html.Attribute` for use with `Html` elements.
